name: view_1
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_1 AS SELECT customer_id, churn_category, churn_score, cltv, satisfaction_score FROM Status_Analysis;

name: view_2
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_2 AS SELECT customer_id, churn_value, satisfaction_score, cltv, churn_score FROM Status_Analysis;

name: view_3
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_3 AS SELECT customer_id, internet_type, streaming_tv, streaming_movies, churn_value FROM Status_Analysis INNER JOIN Online_Services ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Online_Services.customer_id;

name: view_4
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_4 AS SELECT customer_id, age, gender, number_of_dependents, churn_label FROM Status_Analysis INNER JOIN Customer_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Customer_Info.customer_id;

name: view_5
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_5 AS SELECT customer_id, offer, contract, churn_label, churn_reason FROM Status_Analysis INNER JOIN Service_Options ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Service_Options.customer_id INNER JOIN Payment_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id;
